name: typography-muted
visual_summary: Typography-muted is a component that provides a subtle muted text effect. It's suitable for displaying secondary information such as labels, placeholder text, or hints. Use it when you want to create a visually appealing contrast without drawing attention away from primary content.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready typography component with the following characteristics:

Name: typography-muted
Description: Typography-muted is a component that provides a subtle muted text effect. It's suitable for displaying secondary information such as labels, placeholder text, or hints. Use it when you want to create a visually appealing contrast without drawing attention away from primary content.
Style: monochromatic, minimalist
Interactions: 
Tags: typography, secondary, labels, placeholders

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
